notes.cycle_timer: cycle_timer counts down by 1 each step in the environment update — this is not a rule, it is the passage of simulated time. Rules react when cycle_timer reaches zero. The engine clamps cycle_timer at zero; it never goes negative.
notes.cycle_time: cycle_time is the normal green phase duration in steps. cycle_timer is the live countdown. They start equal; the timer resets to cycle_time after each phase change.
notes.yellow_duration: The yellow phase lasts a fixed number of steps defined here, not by cycle_time. It is intentionally short.
notes.clearance_duration: The all-red clearance interval between normal phase transitions. Gives vehicles already in the intersection time to clear before opposing traffic receives a green signal. Distinct from emergency ALL_RED, which is flagged separately by the emergency state variable.
notes.clearance: The clearance flag in state distinguishes a normal all-red clearance interval from an emergency all-red. clearance = true means the intersection is between normal phases. clearance = false during ALL_RED means an emergency is active.
notes.seed: Change this value to produce a different simulation run. The same seed always produces the same sequence of environment updates. The seed is written to the log at the start of every run.
notes.step_delay_ms: Controls how fast the simulation runs on screen. 500ms is readable. Set to 0 to run instantly and only read the log.
